seoTitle: Upper Flagstone vs Upper Glastonbury — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Upper Flagstone and Upper Glastonbury. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Upper Flagstone vs Upper Glastonbury: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Flagstone and Upper Glastonbury.
heading: Upper Flagstone vs Upper Glastonbury — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Flagstone, Queensland and Upper Glastonbury, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Flagstone has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Upper Glastonbury (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Flagstone or Upper Glastonbury safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Flagstone has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Upper Glastonbury scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Flagstone scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Glastonbury scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Flagstone or Upper Glastonbury?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Flagstone has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
